use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in SaaS dashboards and web applications
Form submission and action triggers with multiple visual variants
Navigation and menu controls with state-based styling
Accessible interactive elements with keyboard focus support
Themed button system supporting destructive, secondary, and ghost styles
ai_summary: A versatile React button component with 9 style variants using class-variance-authority for consistent theming. Supports multiple states including hover, focus-visible, disabled, and open (toggle) states. Built with Radix UI Slot for flexibility and Lucide React icons support. Ideal for SaaS products and developer tools requiring accessible, well-structured button systems across desktop and mobile platforms.
